newsSince: No genuinely new company news since June 9; the defining catalyst (mid-quarter Q2 guidance raise to $142M plus a new OEM patent licensee, backlog +70% to $300.6M, Needham PT to $350) was May 26 and analyst upgrades flowed shortly after. The +20% move since June 9 is continued rerating/momentum, not fresh fundamentals. Heavy ongoing CEO/insider selling persists.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: 48V/Vertical Power Delivery is a genuine AI-power bottleneck, but the IP-licensing/guidance thesis was already priced in late May and continued insider selling caps conviction. No new info since June 9; correctly parked in the crowded/rerated bucket. Hold at 54.
verdicts.bull: Factorized/Vertical Power Delivery royalties from new OEM licensee add high-margin revenue; backlog +70%, book-to-bill >2.0.
verdicts.neutral: Strategically important power bottleneck but the stock already rerated; residual alpha vs passives is thin.
verdicts.bear: +191% YTD, relentless one-way insider/CEO selling, and the licensing thesis fully recognized.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Additional OEM patent licensees / royalty ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Heavy insider selling; valuation already rerated
